summary: Modified the statusline extension to add session name, thinking level, working directory, and asynchronous git dirty/ahead/behind status indicators, without regressing the default layout or extension statuses.
filesChanged: extensions/statusline/index.ts - Added session name, thinking level, working dir, and background git polling indicators.
extensions/statusline/README.md - Updated documentation overview and documented git performance polling strategy.
howToVerify: node -e 'const cp=require("child_process");const PKG=cp.execSync("cd \"$(dirname \"$(readlink -f \"$(command -v pi)\")\")/..\" && pwd",{shell:"/bin/bash"}).toString().trim();const{createJiti}=require(PKG+"/node_modules/jiti");const A={"@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent":PKG+"/dist/index.js","@earendil-works/pi-agent-core":PKG+"/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-agent-core/dist/index.js","@earendil-works/pi-tui":PKG+"/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist/index.js","@earendil-works/pi-ai":PKG+"/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-ai/dist/index.js","@earendil-works/pi-ai/oauth":PKG+"/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-ai/dist/oauth.js"};const j=createJiti(process.cwd(),{alias:A});j.import("./extensions/statusline/index.ts").then(m=>{if(typeof m.default!=="function")throw new Error("default export not a function");console.log("STATUSLINE OK")}).catch(e=>{console.error("FAIL",e.message);process.exit(1)})'
raw:
## Completed
- Added **Session Name** rendering to the left-most position of the footer when present, colored in `accent` for visual hierarchy and tabbed with a pencil icon (`✎ name`).
- Integrated **Thinking Level** indicator for reasoning models next to the Model ID (`model • thinking-level` or `model • thinking off` if reasoning is supported but disabled).
- Appended **Working Directory** (relative to home, e.g. `~/dir`) inside the left group after the branch section, colored in `dim`.
- Developed asynchronous, non-blocking **Git Dirty/Ahead/Behind** status indicators for the branch section. A background interval polls status every 2.5 seconds using `execFile` (`git status --porcelain=v1` and `git rev-list --left-right --count HEAD...@{upstream}`). This keeps the `render()` loop synchronous and lightweight, calling `tui.requestRender()` only when a change is detected. The polling timer and the branch-change listener are cleaned up correctly upon `dispose()`.
- Preserved existing layout structure, context bar, cost metrics, and critical alphabetical extension-statuses line with zero regressions.
- Updated documentation in `extensions/statusline/README.md` to reflect the new layout and document the performance-critical git polling architecture.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/statusline/index.ts` - Refactored footer renderer logic to include session names, thinking levels, cwd, and git indicator polling/indicators.
- `extensions/statusline/README.md` - Updated overview sections and documented asynchronous Git polling performance conventions.

## How To Verify
To run module-eval verification (verifies loader compatibility and export type):
```bash
node -e 'const cp=require("child_process");const PKG=cp.execSync("cd \"$(dirname \"$(readlink -f \"$(command -v pi)\")\")/..\" && pwd",{shell:"/bin/bash"}).toString().trim();const{createJiti}=require(PKG+"/node_modules/jiti");const A={"@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent":PKG+"/dist/index.js","@earendil-works/pi-agent-core":PKG+"/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-agent-core/dist/index.js","@earendil-works/pi-tui":PKG+"/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist/index.js","@earendil-works/pi-ai":PKG+"/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-ai/dist/index.js","@earendil-works/pi-ai/oauth":PKG+"/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-ai/dist/oauth.js"};const j=createJiti(process.cwd(),{alias:A});j.import("./extensions/statusline/index.ts").then(m=>{if(typeof m.default!=="function")throw new Error("default export not a function");console.log("STATUSLINE OK")}).catch(e=>{console.error("FAIL",e.message);process.exit(1)})'
```

To run the full test suite of the harness orchestrator:
```bash
grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/docer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
```

## Notes
- The Git indicators parse `--porcelain=v1` stdout cleanly. Staged changes match lines where `line[0]` is not a space and not `?`. Unstaged changes (including untracked files) match lines where `line[1]` is not a space.
- Errors inside asynchronous calls are swallowed and default back to `0`, ensuring the TUI footer never throws or crashes due to temporary git command locks or missing upstreams.
